meta.title: monsmain — Developer & Security Tools Builder
meta.description: Portfolio of monsmain — developer focused on security tools, ethical hacking, and Go. The world is full of bugs; I'm just here to debug it.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Who I Am
about.p1: The world is full of bugs; I'm just here to debug it. I'm a developer focused on building security tools and ethical hacking utilities.
about.p2: I work primarily with Go, Python, and JavaScript. My projects range from brute-force tools and network scanners to cloud storage apps on Cloudflare Workers with Telegram bot integration.
about.p3: I'm currently learning advanced ethical hacking and programming. When I'm not coding, I'm exploring new tools and contributing to open source.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: Things I've Built
projects.p1_desc: A Cloudflare Worker-based cloud storage app with Telegram bot integration and R2 storage support.
projects.p2_desc: Instagram password brute-force tool with Tor and proxy support. No root required. 36+ stars on GitHub.
projects.p3_desc: A fast endpoint discovery and port scanner written in Go.
projects.p4_desc: Iranian SMS bomber — Android app built with Kotlin and Go backend with multi-provider API support.
projects.p5_desc: A user agents checker tool written in Go. Validates and analyzes browser user agent strings.
projects.p6_desc: Automatically refreshes or pings a website in an infinite loop using customizable HTTP headers.
